name: Mystery Case Files: A Crime in Reflection Collector's Edition
short_description: A simple museum heist becomes a desperate rescue from the forces of darkness!
detailed_description:
GrandMA Studios invites you to return to the world of the ever-vigilant Master Detective once again in Mystery Case Files: A Crime in Reflection!

Just when you thought it was safe to take a vacation, the Crown calls you back into action! While burglary cases aren’t the Master Detective’s typical area of investigation, the police are stumped when a royal coronation scepter is stolen from one of the most secure museums in the world in the latest of a series of similar incidents, and they’re turning to you for help. The thieves have proven to be careless but crafty, somehow able to get in and out of the most secure locations in seconds and disappear into thin air! But what starts as a simple series of heists quickly spirals out of control when the criminals awaken something that will put them, the Master Detective, and even the world itself in grave danger!

Can you unlock the bloody secrets the thieves discovered and save the day? There’s only one way to find out, Detective! Crack the case in this all-new Hidden-Object Puzzle Adventure!

This is a special Collector's Edition release full of exclusive extras you won't find in the standard version. The Collector's Edition includes:

  • Visit the Mirror World to protect your brother from an evil entity who stole his memory!

  • Download unique, original concept art, wallpapers, soundtracks, and more!

  • Outwit your foes with the helpful strategy guide!

  • Collect all the Picture Fragments to finish the story, and gather Puzzle Pieces for a bonus Jigsaw Puzzle!

  • Play and re-play mini-games and HOPs to earn Achievements!

This is a Hidden Object Puzzle Adventure game, meaning a specific genre of story-driven, point & click adventures. Throughout the game, players are tasked to find a list of objects hidden within a particular scene, and to occasionally complete various mini-games/puzzles.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German
*languages with full audio support
